gibbs: What did you do in this project?
How did you feel while making it?
What went well? What was hard?
Why did things go the way they did?
kolb: What did you notice while working on it?
What does this connect to that you already knew?
What's one thing you want to try next time?
5r: What happened in your project? Describe it simply.
How did you respond to what happened?
Have you experienced something like this before?
Why do you think it worked or didn't?
What would you do next time?
socratic: Why did you choose to do it that way?
What would happen if you changed one part?
